title: Password-Height
scenario: Your coworker doesn't like sending passwords over text, instead he texts you a picture of them. This last image he sent is cropped to only reveal part of the password. Reveal the full password to secure your flag.
learningObjectives: Learn about edit file hex values
hints: The hex of jpeg can restrict an image to display less information then is actually stored in it.
Look up the definition for a JPEG SOF0 header.

llmHandoff.scope: This folder is the full scope for the challenge.
llmHandoff.implementNext: Replace placeholder artifacts and write the real challenge files.
llmHandoff.doNotDoYet: Do not touch the portal frontend unless the challenge schema changes.
